name: HRT_SKILLS_ENDORSEMENTS
description: This table stores skill endorsement information.

columns.Name: ENDORSEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: SOURCE

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: SOURCE_OBJECT_ID

columns.Name: ENDORSED_BY
columns.Comments: ENDORSED_BY

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS table.

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to Profiles table

columns.Name: REQUESTOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the PERSON_ID of the endorsement requestor.

columns.Name: ENDORSER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the PERSON_ID of the endorser.

columns.Name: ENDORSEMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the different endorsement types. Lookup type - ORA_HRT_SKILL_EVIDENCE_TYPE

columns.Name: RATING_LEVEL_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the rating level associated to endorsement

columns.Name: RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the rating model used for endorsement rating.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores endorsement status. Lookup type - ORA_HRT_ENDORSEMENT_STATUS. Possible values are Pending, Completed, and Ignored

columns.Name: REQUESTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date on which endorsement is requested.

columns.Name: SKILL_SCORE_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_SKILLS_SCORE_CONFIG table.

columns.Name: EXPIRY_DATE
columns.Comments: Expiry date

columns.Name: ENDORSED_DATE
columns.Comments: Endorsement date

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
